message:
test(fcp-host): align integration tests with truthful unknown metadata contract

Update SubprocessRegistry assertions: archetype defaults to Unknown
(was RequestResponse), rate limits default to None (was empty).
Add explicit assertions for unknown states through introspection.
Update bead 1g7z0.29.6.1 with metadata-truth progress notes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -143,7 +143,7 @@
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.2","title":"[FWC] Catalog truth: host-backed template, validate, and example materialization from live introspection","description":"Make template, validate, and example-generation surfaces derive from live host introspection and runtime schema truth whenever the user is operating against a live system.

Offline template generation may still exist, but it must be explicit and separately labeled.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Template, validate, and example-generation surfaces are host-backed in live mode and explicitly offline otherwise; there is no ambiguous mixed-source path. 2. Generated examples, templates, and validation results expose provenance, support state, and whether runtime context was live, unavailable, stale, or intentionally offline. 3. Offline generation remains available through explicit offline mode so users keep the full feature surface without confusing it for live runtime truth. 4. Unit/snapshot, host integration, and transcript-style E2E coverage include live success, explicit offline mode, and unavailable-host refusal cases.","notes":"This bead owns template rendering, example materialization, and validation outputs once a live schema or operation has been selected. `1g7z0.29.5.1` owns discovery/browse of whether those artifacts exist; this bead owns the actual generated payloads and their provenance.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:34.178418Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","updated_at":"2026-03-12T04:59:49.119562Z","closed_at":"2026-03-12T04:59:49.119240Z","close_reason":"Verified current tree satisfies acceptance; targeted host/offline tests and cargo check passed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["catalog","fwc","templates","truthfulness"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:58:48.752138Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:58:49.073957Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:34.178418Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:34.384821Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:58:49.303945Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.3","title":"[FWC] Catalog truth: host-backed export-tools and serve-mcp over live inventory","description":"Make `export-tools` and `serve-mcp` expose the real running inventory and capability set, not workspace guesses.

This task is the direct closure path for the requirement that MCP surfaces must be working for real with zero mocks or fake placeholders.","acceptance_criteria":"1. `export-tools` and `serve-mcp` reflect the real running inventory, tool capability set, and auth/zone-scoped availability. 2. Tool-call routing and capability advertisement are tied to host truth plus explicit unknown, unsupported, unavailable, or withheld semantics, not workspace guesses or silent fallbacks. 3. If live host truth is missing, commands refuse or require explicit offline mode instead of exporting stale surfaces. 4. Dispatch tests, host integration, transcript E2E scripts, and detailed logs cover live success, auth-scoped withholding or denial, and unavailable-host cases.","notes":"This is the trust boundary bead for downstream agents. It must enforce that exported tool surfaces respect runtime auth and zone scope and carry enough state/provenance to tell an agent when a tool is absent, unsupported, withheld, or truly live.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:34.625932Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","updated_at":"2026-03-12T05:37:10.847768Z","closed_at":"2026-03-12T05:37:10.846113Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["catalog","fwc","mcp","truthfulness"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:58:49.517504Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:58:49.736593Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:58:01.626772Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:34.625932Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:34.831829Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:58:49.969814Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1556,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.5.3","author":"QuietBasin","text":"## Plan-space refinement: serve-mcp inventory truth should ride on the real-time evidence substrate

This bead already owns host-truthful inventory exposure for `export-tools` and `serve-mcp`. When dependency edits become writable again, consider an explicit edge to `1g7z0.29.2.3` so the graph records that genuinely live `serve-mcp` exposure should sit on top of real logs/events/receipts/replay substrate rather than a partial transport. The intent is not to delay inventory work unnecessarily; it is to make the proof obligations for live MCP serving more obvious.","created_at":"2026-03-11T21:31:44Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6","title":"[FWC] Truthful metadata contract: unknown stays unknown and nothing gets invented","description":"Remove any invented runtime metadata from host and CLI surfaces.

If archetype, rate limits, event support, auth requirements, or related capability descriptors are not known truthfully, the system must say so instead of manufacturing a plausible default. The goal is to make incorrect confidence impossible.","acceptance_criteria":"1. The host/CLI model forbids invented runtime metadata and replaces it with explicit known/unknown/unsupported vocabulary.
2. User-facing output becomes more trustworthy even when less information is available.
3. The resulting state model is detailed enough for discovery, config, simulate, alias/completion, and workflow layers to consume consistently.
4. Verification obligations for both local rendering and host-backed behavior are explicit.","notes":"This is the semantic hygiene lane. It exists because misleading metadata is one of the easiest ways to make a control plane feel functional while quietly lying to users. The implementation should prefer absence, provenance, and explicit uncertainty over convenience defaults.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:27:07.894799Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","updated_at":"2026-03-12T05:32:15.306888Z","closed_at":"2026-03-12T05:32:15.305791Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fwc","metadata","truthfulness"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:27:07.894799Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1531,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6","author":"QuietBasin","text":"## Track rationale: unknown must stay unknown

This track is the explicit response to the plan requirement to remove synthetic defaults. The issue is not only incorrect data; it is the false confidence created when the system substitutes plausible values for missing truth.

### Decomposition
- `29.6.1` removes invented archetypes, rate limits, capability flags, and similar synthetic metadata defaults.
- `29.6.2` defines the explicit host/CLI vocabulary for unknown, unsupported, unavailable, and not-yet-measured states.

### Design intent
The end state should make it mechanically harder to lie accidentally. If the runtime does not know something, the type shape, JSON envelope, and user-facing copy should all bias toward explicit uncertainty rather than convenience defaults.

### Things future implementers should preserve
- Unknown, unsupported, unavailable, and not-yet-measured are not synonyms.
- Provenance matters: declared-by-connector, observed-by-host, measured-at-runtime, and inferred-from-policy should not blur together.
- Good UX here is not about hiding uncertainty; it is about making uncertainty legible and actionable.","created_at":"2026-03-11T18:47:40Z"}]}
-{"id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.1","title":"[FWC] Metadata truth: stop inventing archetypes, rate limits, and capability flags","description":"Remove synthetic metadata defaults from host discovery/introspection, including invented archetypes, rate limits, and capability flags.

Where the runtime genuinely does not know the answer, it must say unknown instead of selecting a plausible default.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Synthetic defaults for archetype, rate limits, event support, capability flags, and similar metadata are removed.
2. Unknown values remain unknown until measured or declared by a real source.
3. The removal of defaults does not degrade usability because the explicit unknown-state model remains consumable.
4. Unit/snapshot, host integration, and transcript/E2E expectations are identified so invented-default regressions are caught in both local rendering and live host flows.","notes":"This bead targets the most tempting kind of technical dishonesty: filling unknowns with values that look helpful. The plan should bias hard toward explicit provenance and uncertainty.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ChartreuseBeacon","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:35.041766Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","updated_at":"2026-03-15T21:03:16.524461Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fwc","metadata","truthfulness"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:35.041766Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1524,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.1","author":"ChartreuseBeacon","text":"Taking a focused metadata-truth slice on descriptor/discovery/readiness plumbing. Planned edit surface: crates/fcp-core/src/connector_descriptors.rs, crates/fcp-host/src/discovery.rs, crates/fwc/src/readiness.rs, crates/fwc/src/main.rs. Attempted Agent Mail file reservations for those exact paths, but the local Agent Mail DB is intermittently locked/corrupt; the last successful `am file_reservations active` showed no active reservations before the attempt.","created_at":"2026-03-11T18:41:08Z"},{"id":1675,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.1","author":"YellowDesert","text":"Taking a bounded truthful-metadata sub-slice in crates/fcp-host/src/bin/fcp-host.rs. Goal: stop the host test connector from inventing metadata when the env/config does not declare it, specifically unset archetype -> Unknown instead of RequestResponse and synthetic empty rate-limit declarations -> None. I’ll keep this scoped to that file plus regression tests, then verify with rch.","created_at":"2026-03-15T21:00:15Z"},{"id":1680,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.1","author":"OrangeHeron","text":"Taking a non-overlapping fwc consumer slice on metadata truthfulness. Planned edit surface: crates/fwc/src/readiness.rs and crates/fwc/src/main.rs. Goal: stop CLI-side summary/operation models from forcing uncertain live metadata into raw false booleans for fields like has_events and supports_simulate; preserve explicit unknown-state semantics instead. I am deliberately avoiding YellowDesert's active crates/fcp-host/src/bin/fcp-host.rs slice.","created_at":"2026-03-15T21:03:16Z"}]}

I am deliberately avoiding YellowDesert's active crates/fcp-host/src/bin/fcp-host.rs slice.","created_at":"2026-03-15T21:03:16Z"},{"id":1684,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.1","author":"jemanuel","text":"Taking a bounded host integration regression slice in crates/fcp-host/tests/host_connector_integration.rs to align the test-local subprocess registry with truthful unknown metadata (no synthetic archetype or rate-limit defaults) and add assertions so live subprocess discovery catches the regression.","created_at":"2026-03-15T22:02:16Z"},{"id":1685,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.1","author":"jemanuel","text":"Completed a bounded host integration truthfulness regression slice in crates/fcp-host/tests/host_connector_integration.rs. The test-local subprocess registry now preserves unknown archetype/rate-limit metadata, and host_discovery_with_subprocess_connectors now asserts archetype=unknown and rate_limits absent for live subprocess connectors. Verified with rch exec -- env CARGO_HOME=/tmp/indigocitadel-cargo-home-host-int CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/indigocitadel-target-host-int cargo test -p fcp-host --test host_connector_integration host_discovery_with_subprocess_connectors -- --nocapture.","created_at":"2026-03-15T22:05:39Z"},{"id":1686,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.1","author":"jemanuel","text":"Taking a bounded core-contract slice across crates/fcp-core/src/connector.rs plus focused fcp-sdk tests to make FcpConnector::rate_limits() return Option<RateLimitDeclarations> so the default can honestly be unknown/undeclared instead of an invented empty declaration set.","created_at":"2026-03-15T22:07:18Z"},{"id":1687,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.1","author":"jemanuel","text":"Completed the core rate-limit unknown-state contract slice. FcpConnector::rate_limits() now returns Option<RateLimitDeclarations> with a default of None, and the focused SDK tests now prove default unknown vs explicit Some(...) declarations. Verified remotely with the targeted sdk_rate_limit_declarations and sdk_trait_tests runs via rch.","created_at":"2026-03-15T22:10:39Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.2","title":"[FWC] Metadata truth: explicit unknown or unsupported state model across host and CLI","description":"Define the explicit host/CLI representation for unknown, unsupported, unavailable, and not-yet-measured metadata states.

This gives agents an honest vocabulary for reasoning about gaps without the runtime pretending certainty it does not have.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Unknown, unsupported, unavailable, and not-yet-measured states have distinct host and CLI representations.
2. Those states are stable across TOON/JSON output, logs, and follow-up guidance.
3. Downstream discovery/config/simulate/workflow surfaces can reference this vocabulary without inventing custom variants.
4. Unit, integration, and transcript verification expectations are explicit.","notes":"This is the semantic vocabulary bead. A lot of user confusion comes from the system using the same shape of message for fundamentally different states; this bead prevents that.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:35.247609Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","updated_at":"2026-03-12T05:37:10.813420Z","closed_at":"2026-03-12T05:37:10.812146Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["errors","fwc","metadata","truthfulness"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:35.247609Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:35.445586Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1554,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.6.2","author":"QuietBasin","text":"## Plan-space refinement: provenance is part of the shared state vocabulary

This bead should be treated as owning not only the state labels `unknown`, `unsupported`, `unavailable`, and `not-yet-measured`, but also the provenance/source markers that explain *why* a value exists at all. Future implementation should preserve distinctions like declared-by-connector, observed-by-host, measured-at-runtime, and inferred-from-policy rather than collapsing them into one vague source label. That distinction is critical for user trust and for downstream MCP/export/workflow reasoning.","created_at":"2026-03-11T21:31:43Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.7","title":"[FWC] Truthful workflow execution: no planning-only runtime verbs in the canonical control path","description":"Clean up the workflow and intent layers so the canonical agent path never implies that planning-only or stubbed runtime control exists when it does not.

This track owns `pipe`, `recipe`, `pipeline`, and intent-derived lifecycle/control verbs that must either execute via real host primitives or fail honestly with explicit unsupported, offline, or planned semantics.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Workflow and intent layers preserve all useful planning/help behavior while refusing to pretend runtime execution happened.
2. Unsupported, planned, offline-only, and live-runtime workflow states are made explicit and machine-readable.
3. The track improves user trust and recovery rather than merely restricting features.
4. Unit, integration, and E2E expectations are explicit across the child beads.","notes":"Implementation lanes: `1g7z0.29.7.1` through `.7.3`. Closure overlay: `1g7z0.29.16`. This track is about truthful execution semantics in higher-level workflows.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:27:08.618939Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","updated_at":"2026-03-12T05:32:15.323482Z","closed_at":"2026-03-12T05:32:15.321806Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fwc","truthfulness","workflow"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.7","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:27:08.618939Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1532,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.7","author":"QuietBasin","text":"## Track rationale: polished workflow UX without runtime theater

This track exists because workflow surfaces are where users are most likely to over-trust a polished CLI. Plans, pipelines, recipes, and pipes can be incredibly useful, but the canonical control path must never let planning or offline expansion masquerade as live runtime execution.

### Decomposition
- `29.7.1` makes `pipe`, `recipe run`, and `pipeline run` either host-backed or explicit refusals.
- `29.7.2` constrains intent/planning layers so they only expose host-backed control primitives.
- `29.7.3` standardizes the output semantics for unsupported, planned, offline-only, unavailable, denied, and live-runtime states.

### Key idea to preserve
The branch is not anti-workflow. It is anti-ambiguity. High-level workflow affordances should remain ambitious, but they must carry truthful receipts, logs, and refusal semantics so an agent never confuses a plan artifact with a completed side effect.","created_at":"2026-03-11T18:47:40Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.7.1","title":"[FWC] Workflow truth: real host execution or honest refusal for pipe, recipe, and pipeline runtime paths","description":"Make `pipe`, `recipe run`, and `pipeline run` either execute through real host-backed primitives or fail explicitly as unsupported for live runtime use.

This task exists to eliminate planning-only runtime paths from the canonical execution story.","acceptance_criteria":"1. `pipe`, `recipe run`, and `pipeline run` either execute through real host-backed, auth-enforced primitives or refuse explicitly. 2. Refusal output distinguishes unsupported, planned, offline-only, unavailable, and denied states. 3. Workflow logs, receipts, and replay artifacts make it impossible to confuse planned work with real side effects. 4. Integration and E2E verification cover live success, denial, unavailable-host cases, and the detailed logging contract.","notes":"This bead keeps ambitious workflow UX without letting it impersonate a finished runtime. The closure criteria now explicitly require auth enforcement and receipt-quality evidence, because workflows are exactly where users are most likely to over-trust a polished surface.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:35.662643Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","updated_at":"2026-03-12T06:50:46.786686Z","closed_at":"2026-03-12T06:50:46.786138Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fwc","pipeline","truthfulness","workflow"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.7.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:35.865902Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.7.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:58:50.863594Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.7.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:36.061223Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.7.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:58:51.088899Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.7.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:58:51.322485Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.7.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-11T06:28:35.662643Z","created_by":"AmberHorizon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1569,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-1g7z0.29.7.1","author":"Jeff Emanuel","text":"Verified: pipe returns status=planned with OfflineArtifact availability. Pipeline run/dry-run uses missing_host_dispatch when no host. Recipe run also uses missing_host_dispatch. Pipeline estimate tagged OfflineArtifact. All three command families correctly refuse live execution without host and produce honest availability markers. Existing integration tests (pipeline_dry_run, batch_file_dry_run) verify the host-backed flow.","created_at":"2026-03-12T06:50:36Z"}]}
